<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md — grow the spec, fix the reference, fork for everything else. -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Spec change (`SPEC.md` / `core/` / `extra/`)
- [ ] Reference **bug fix** (`reference/`) — defect or spec-alignment
- [ ] Docs

> New reference *features* aren't accepted — propose them as an `extra/` spec instead.

## What changes, and why?


## For reference code changes
- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] `pnpm test:run` passes
- [ ] No new `.js`/`.jsx` (TypeScript-only)
